title: A Crew Member on the Line
description: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
scene: Across pages 8, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Luffy, Aokiji, Foxy, Nami, Usopp. The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Those without strength are better off fleeing!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: And the new age they herald! Fufufufufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami! Nico Robin! Are you okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Perhaps it ran out of air...

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: We managed to get down alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: From one hell of a place.

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: It truly was a distant place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Maybe you'd go there if you died?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Or close to it, at least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No one would have difficulty sailing it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The waves are acting a little odd.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy Pirate
dialogue.text: Everyone on your feet! Take the helm!

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: And there's something inside the waves too!

summary: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
